Test Case Name: TC01_GL/Umbrella Update Screen Display - PRODUCED Scope - New Business
Description: Validate new update screen displays for GL/Umbrella PRODUCED scope submissions on new business
Actions:
1. Initiate a New Business submission for GL/Umbrella
2. Set Scope = PRODUCED
3. Navigate to Line Selection screen
4. Add GL and Umbrella LOBs
5. Fill all mandatory fields in Property and GL/Umbrella screens
6. Click Price button
7. Approve Underwriter rules
8. Navigate to Update screen
9. Verify Master Policy table appears with country list
Expected Results:
1. New update screen should be displayed for GL/Umbrella PRODUCED submission
2. Screen should show countries: Canada, Any countries = local policy, Any countries = Freedom of Service - Local Policy, Any Countries = Freedom of Service - Ground up
3. Canada should show Insurance Solution = Master Policy
4. System should display the Master Policy table with solution/coverage summary
5. Only specified countries should be displayed in the summary
6. No other countries should appear
7. Quoted Premium column should be visible and editable
Test Repository Path: MM - November 2025 / CAMS-1178 GL/Umbrella International Premium Allocation - table enhancements

Test Case Name: TC02_GL/Umbrella Update Screen - Existing Policy Not Visible

3. Navigate to Update screen

Expected Results:
1. Old update screen should be displayed
2. New update screen should NOT be visible
3. User should see the original premium entry interface

Test Case Name: TC03_GL/Umbrella Update Screen - Policy Change Renewal
Description: Validate update screen is NOT visible for Policy Change until renewal

1. Retrieve an existing GL/Umbrella policy (NB)

Expected Results:

3. Upon Renewal, new update screen should be displayed
4. User should see updated Master Policy table on renewal

Test Case Name: TC04_DIC/DIL Coverage Creation - Local Policy Insurance Solution
Description: Validate new DIC/DIL coverage is created when Local Policy insurance solution is selected
Actions:
1. Initiate New Business GL/Umbrella PRODUCED submission
2. Add receiving territory with Insurance Solution = Local Policy
3. On Update screen, locate Master Policy table
4. Click on Local Policy row
5. Navigate to Coverage section
Expected Results:
1. New DIC/DIL coverage (DIC/DIL - Country Code) should be available
2. Coverage should be created for GL LOB
3. Coverage should be created for Umbrella LOB
4. DIC/DIL prefix should be followed by country code (e.g., DIC/DIL - CA)
5. Coverage should link to specified country in receiving territory

Description: Validate Umbrella premiums are allocated 100% as DIC/DIL to master policy

4. Locate Umbrella coverage section

6. Review Master Policy table
Expected Results:
1. Premium entered for Umbrella should be considered 100% DIC/DIL
2. Premium allocation should show 100% to Master Policy
3. No split options should be available for Umbrella
4. Umbrella premium should not appear on local policy premiums
5. Master Policy calculation should include Umbrella as DIC/DIL

Test Case Name: TC11_Premium Retention - Quoted to Actual Conversion
Description: Validate DIC/DIL quoted and actual premiums are retained after conversion
Actions:
1. Initiate New Business GL/Umbrella PRODUCED submission
2. Add receiving territory with Insurance Solution = Local Policy
3. Navigate to Update screen
4. Enter Quoted Premium for DIC/DIL
5. Click Price button
6. Navigate to Update screen
7. Update Actual Premium for DIC/DIL
8. Verify retention
Expected Results:
1. Quoted Premium should be retained after actual premium entry
2. Actual Premium should be editable independently
3. Both quoted and actual should remain visible in Master Policy table
4. Premiums should not be deleted or reset
5. Historical values should be preserved

Description: Validate Master Policy premium is correctly calculated as (Total - Local Premiums)
Actions:
1. Initiate New Business GL/Umbrella PRODUCED submission
2. Add multiple countries with mixed Insurance Solutions
3. Enter local policy premiums for each country
4. Navigate to Master Policy table
5. Verify calculation
Expected Results:
1. Master Policy Premium = Total Program Premium - Sum of Local Policy Premiums
2. Calculation should exclude DIC/DIL amounts (100% to Master)
3. Currency conversion should be applied correctly
4. Master Premium should reflect in policy documents
5. Calculation should be validated for GL and Umbrella separately
